title: Chests Reimagined
body:
![Logo](https://i.gyazo.com/5e557be2df02d18506b3a5d6eb1b6d2b.png)

This pack is originally from my pack [Minecraft Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined) but I thought some people may like it but not my pack, so I decided to give it, it's standalone pack!

![Line](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1011243706063527961/1069384365785743534/line2.png)

Chests Reimagined gives the chests a bit of an updated refreshed look, not only is the texture updated for all chests, but they've gotten a custom 3D model that is actually less performance heavy than normal vanilla chests incase you use a mod like optifine which supports their custom optimised animations. So that's right, if you use a mod like optifine, these chests not only will hopefully look cooler with their new cutom 3D holes when opened and their brand new reimagined texture, they'll also be better for your performance!

The pack lastly also gives the chests a bit of new sounds to go along with the new chests as well as an animated portal inside of the ender chest.


![Line](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1011243706063527961/1069384365785743534/line2.png)
